response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive full-stack and software development experience, but his background lacks the core C++ and STL focus required for this role. His expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and Java does not align well with the industrial automation and high-performance C++ systems needed for this position. Additionally, there is no evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices, IEC 62443 standards, or industrial cybersecurity experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills with diverse language experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java)
Experience with distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and cloud technologies
Proven track record in mentoring, teaching, and technical leadership through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Insufficient experience with C++ and STL, which is a core requirement for this role
No demonstrated expertise in secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards
Lacks direct experience in industrial automation, on-premises solutions, or message-broker-based large-scale applications
